questions.text: If s = 10 and a=5, b=5, c=10, the triangle area is:
questions.explanation: s-c = 10-10 = 0. Product is 0. Triangle cannot exist (sum of 5+5 is not > 10).

questions.text: An equilateral triangle and a square have same perimeter. Which has more area?
questions.explanation: For a fixed perimeter, shapes with more 'regular' sides and circularity have more area.

questions.text: Area of a right isosceles triangle with hypotenuse 'h' is:
questions.explanation: 2a² = h² => a² = h²/2. Area = 1/2 a² = h²/4.
